evaluation_metrics.task_completion: Did the agent complete the task (0-100%)?
evaluation_metrics.context_utilization: Did it use all provided context (0-100%)?
evaluation_metrics.coherence: Is the output coherent and well-structured (0-100%)?
evaluation_metrics.knowledge_retention: Did it remember context across steps (0-100%)?

tasks.name: Prospect Research Brief
tasks.description: Generate a prospect research brief for a Series B SaaS company in the HR tech space

input.context: Company raised $15M Series B, 50 employees, focusing on employee retention

expected_output_criteria.firmographics: Company size, stage, funding, headcount estimated
expected_output_criteria.decision_makers: Key personas identified with likely roles
expected_output_criteria.personalization: Specific to prospect company, not generic

tasks.name: Cold Email Sequence
tasks.description: Write a 3-email cold sequence for a prospect in the EOR space

prospect.name: Sarah Chen
prospect.title: Head of International Expansion
prospect.company_context: Raised Series C, expanding to 12 new countries

input.angle: Simplifying global hiring without local entities

expected_output_criteria.authenticity: Sounds like a human, not a bot
expected_output_criteria.compliance: No aggressive sales language, helpful tone

tasks.name: Use Case Building
tasks.description: Build a compelling ROI use case: HR team at 500-person company switching to Atlas

input.problem: Managing payroll, benefits, compliance across 8 countries manually

expected_output_criteria.roi_calculation: Realistic cost savings (FTE hours, compliance risk reduction)
expected_output_criteria.metrics: Quantified: time saved, cost reduction, risk mitigation
expected_output_criteria.narrative: Compelling story arc with specific numbers

tasks.name: Code Review
tasks.description: Review a REST API endpoint for security and performance issues

input.code: def get_user_profile(user_id): db = connect_db(); user = db.query(f'SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}'); return user

tasks.name: Bug Investigation
tasks.description: Debug why user authentication is failing intermittently in production

input.error_pattern: Auth fails 1-2 times per hour randomly, then works
input.context: JWT expires in 1 hour, refresh token valid for 30 days

expected_output_criteria.root_cause: Identified race condition or clock skew

tasks.name: Blog Post Outline
tasks.description: Create a blog post outline on global hiring best practices

input.audience: HR directors and people ops managers

expected_output_criteria.ctas: Natural tie-ins to Atlas without hard selling

tasks.name: Pipeline Analysis
tasks.description: Analyze a sales pipeline and identify weak stages

input.context: 3-month trend showing declining conversion at stage 2

expected_output_criteria.root_cause_hypothesis: Qualification criteria too loose or demo process weak
expected_output_criteria.recommendations: Specific actions: tighter qualification, demo improvements

tasks.name: Project Closeout Report
tasks.description: Generate a project closeout report for completed GTM campaign

input.goals: Launch with 100 targeted accounts, generate 5 qualified meetings

expected_output_criteria.recommendations: Next steps / improvements for similar projects

tasks.name: Meeting Notes to Action Items
tasks.description: Extract action items and decisions from messy meeting notes

input.notes: Talked about new feature roadmap. Marketing wants email templates, engineering says 2 weeks, Sarah will check competitor features. Need design review from David. Q4 deadline. Budget not discussed yet. Next meeting Friday.

expected_output_criteria.action_items: Clear owner, task, deadline for each
expected_output_criteria.next_steps: Friday meeting scheduled, budget discussion pending

tasks.name: Competitive Intelligence Brief
tasks.description: Create a competitive intelligence brief on Deel vs Atlas

tasks.name: API Integration Design
tasks.description: Design an API integration between Atlas payroll and Salesforce CRM

input.use_case: Sync employee data to CRM contacts for sales visibility

expected_output_criteria.api_endpoints: Specific Atlas and SFDC endpoints needed
expected_output_criteria.security: API auth, data encryption, PII handling
